name: image_load_side_load_wwlib
raw_query: any where file.path:"*\\wwlib.dll" and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Office\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Office\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\winword.exe" and (file.path like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft Office\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Office\\*"))))
